title: MiniGPT required-term pair minimal prompt objective readiness

check_rows.detail: surface branch closeout must pass before opening the next objective
previous branch must be closed as contextual decode aid
previous branch must not be promotable as a baseline
recommended next route must be minimal_prompt_surface_objective
readiness must preserve the no-promotion model-quality boundary

objective.claim_boundary: minimal prompt only; no contextual answer-bearing anchor
objective.entry_condition: contextual decode aid closed and promotion blocked
objective.blocked_prompt_surface: contextual variants that reveal the other answer before the target prompt
objective.success_criterion: both fixed= and loss= produce their exact terms without contextual anchor across selected seeds
objective.recommended_next_action: add a minimal-prompt corpus contract before running another real checkpoint

interpretation.reason: The previous branch is closed as contextual decode aid, so the next model-quality question must remove the contextual anchor.
interpretation.next_action: add a minimal-prompt corpus contract before running another real checkpoint
